rulings.Case Title: GILBERT VS THE ALLIANCE (UNDER SEAL)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Mtn To Dismiss Filed By Co Df Bart
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, FEBRUARY 15, 2008 LINE 1. DEFENDANT HARMON INDUSTRIES, INC.'S Joinder In MOTION To Dismiss Filed By DEFENDANT BART IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 10, 2008. THE COURT REQUIRES THAT ALL PARTIES ARE TO PROVIDE A SET OF COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS. WHEN SUBMITTING THE DUPLICATE COPIES, PLEASE PROVIDE A COVER LETTER TO THE COURT REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE SO THAT THE COURTESY COPIES WON'T BE MISPLACED WHEN RECEIVED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: GILBANE BUILDING COMPANY V AIR SYSTEMS ACQUISITION, INC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For An Award Of Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, FEBRUARY 15, 2008 LINE 18. DEFENDANTS AIR SYSTEMS ACQUISITION, INC, ARTHUR WILLIAMS, JR. AND JOHN DAVIS' MOTION For An Award Of Attorney'S Fees IS DENIED. IT WAS NOT TIMELY FILED AS REQUIRED BY CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 3.1702 (D). ALTHOUGH THIS IS NOT A JURISDICTIONAL ISSUE, THE RULE IS MANDATORY. SANABRIA V EMBREY (2001) 92 CAL. APP. 4TH 422, 429; HYDRATEC V SUN VALLEY 260 ORCHARD AND VINEYARD CO. (1990) 223 CAL. APP. 3D 924, 929. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD CONTRERAS VS. METROPOLITAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, FEBRUARY 15, 2008 LINE 11. DEFENDANT THE COMMISSIONER OF THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INSURANCE'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. VAN NESS V BLUE CROSS OF CALIFORNIA (2001) 87 CAL. APP. 4TH 364, 371 THROUGH 372 RECOGNIZES A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR A WRIT OF MANDATE "IF AN INSURED BELIEVES THE COMMISSIONER APPROVES A POLICY THAT DOES NOT COMPLY." MANDAMUS WILL LIE TO COMPEL THE EXERCISE OF DISCRETION UNDER A PROPER INTERPRETATION OF THE APPLICABLE LAW. COMMON CAUSE V BOARD OF SUPERVISORS (1989) 49 C. 3D 432, 442. IT IS PREMATURE TO CONCLUDE AS A MATTER OF LAW THAT PLAINTIFF DOES NOT HAVE A BENEFICIAL INTEREST. =(302/PJM/PB)
